things.name: Krasnaya Polyana Ski Resort
things.description: World-class mountain ski resort built for the 2014 Winter Olympics in the Caucasus Mountains

things.name: Sochi Autodrom (F1 Circuit)
things.description: Russian Grand Prix circuit built for Sochi 2014 Olympics in the Olympic Park

things.name: Olympic Park
things.description: 2014 Winter Olympics venue with the Fisht Stadium, ice arenas and the Olympic flame cauldron

things.name: Sochi Arboretum
things.description: 150-year-old botanical garden on the Black Sea coast with exotic subtropical plants

things.name: Agura Waterfalls & Eagle Rocks
things.description: Series of waterfalls in the Agura canyon with the dramatic Eagle Rocks viewpoint

things.name: Vorontsov Caves
things.description: 8km cave system - the longest cave-river system in Russia with stalactites and underground lakes

things.name: Riviera Park
things.description: Historic 19th-century seaside park with the Sochi State Philharmonia and rose garden

things.name: Mount Akhun Tower
things.description: Stone tower on Akhun Mountain with panoramic views of the Caucasus and Black Sea

things.name: Matsesta Sulfur Springs
things.description: Natural sulfur baths used therapeutically since the 19th century - Stalin's favourite

things.name: Rosa Khutor Alpine Resort
things.description: Picturesque alpine village below the Olympic downhill slopes with gondola rides year-round
